Upload an Excel file (.xlsx, .xls, .csv). Required columns: NIC, Name, VotingBox (or Voting Box). Optional: Gender, House, Island, Atoll, DOB, Phone, Party, Constituency.

Embassy Voting Box
Voter re-registers to this embassy box
Country / City
Resort Name Nearest Voting Box (EC assigned)
New House / Address Reason
WARNING: Make sure voter selects the EXACT same new location on the EC portal!
Steps on EC Portal (form.elections.gov.mv)
1
Open EC portal and log in with eFaas
2
Select Re-registration option
3
Enter NIC number (copy from above)
4
Select new island and voting box (use new location above)
5
Enter phone number - OTP sent to voter phone
6
Voter enters OTP, submit, note confirmation number
After Submission
Confirmation Number from EC
Saved successfully!
Steps to Join a Party (EC Portal)
1
Open EC portal link below
2
Log in with voter own eFaas account
3
Select Join a Political Party
4
Choose party from dropdown
5
Select current island and location
6
Enter house name (copy from above) and submit
Voter must use their OWN eFaas account. Field worker guides only.
After Submission
Notes (optional)
Join party application saved!
